first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning for the low score is unchanged between the two evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the fundamental mismatch between the candidate's web/full-stack experience and the requirements of the embedded networking role. The minor differences in wording for the strengths and concerns fall well within the range of ordinary run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate.
